gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) RETURN u.display_name, u.reputation ORDER BY u.reputation ASC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.display_name ORDER BY n.reputation ASC LIMIT 1

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE q.createdAt >= datetime('2020-06-01T00:00:00Z') RETURN u ORDER BY q.createdAt LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.createdAt > date('2020-06-01') RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.createdAt LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE date(q.createdAt).dayOfWeek IN [6, 7] RETURN q ORDER BY q.createdAt LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.createdAt.weekday IN [0, 1, 2, 3] RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.createdAt ASC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE q.answered = FALSE AND q.score < -1 RETURN u
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.score < -1 RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.score < -3 RETURN q.title, q.text, q.link, q.createdAt ORDER BY q.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.score < -3 RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WITH sum(q.upVotes) AS totalUpvotes RETURN totalUpvotes
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n.upVotes)

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q ORDER BY q.downVotes DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.downVotes DESC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q.title, q.createdAt ORDER BY q.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'aws-lambda'}) WITH q, max(q.downVotes) AS maxDownvotes WHERE q.downVotes = maxDownvotes RETURN q.title
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)-[r0:TAGGED]->(m0:Tag {name: 'aws-lambda'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.downVotes DESC LIMIT 1

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > 2000 AND q.score < 0 RETURN q.title AS question_title, q.link AS question_link, q.score AS question_score, u.display_name AS user_name, u.reputation AS user_reputation

gold_cypher: MATCH (:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(tag:Tag) RETURN DISTINCT tag.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tag) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT n.favorites) AS num RETURN n.title ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3
